question: Which category of business has the highest percentage of reviews with a word count greater than 50?
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category)<-[:IN_CATEGORY]-(b2:Business) MATCH (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b2) WITH c, size(split(r.text, ' ')) AS word_count,        CASE WHEN size(split(r.text, ' ')) > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_long_review WITH c, sum(is_long_review) AS long_review_count, count(*) AS total_reviews WITH c, (long_review_count * 1.0 / total_reviews) AS percentage_long_reviews ORDER BY percentage_long_reviews DESC RETURN c.name AS category_name, percentage_long_reviews LIMIT 1
template_key: which category of business has the highest percentage of reviews with a word count greater than <num>

question: Which businesses have received reviews with a wider range of dates, indicating consistent customer engagement?
